Constant
6 C 6 1111111111 a mismatch
6 C 6n 0000000000 a match 1/1
all match C 6n

6 I 0 1011100100 5 mismatch

6 I 7 0110010111 6 mismatch

6 AND 07 0010000100 2 mismatch
6 AND 07n 1101111011 8 mismatch
6 OR 07 1111110111 9 mismatch
6 OR 07n 0000001000 1 mismatch

7 I 0

Applying to 01011100
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 1
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 I 2 = 0
1 I 3 = 1
2 I 4 = 1
3 I 5 = 1
4 I 6 = 0
5 I 7 = 0
6 C 6n = NOT(1) = 0
7 I 0 = 0

\boxed{01110000}
